Video.summary: A dog poses as a pig; a baby sinks a baskeball in the - toilet; and a bull - bumps a boy.
Video.title: Episode 418

Video.summary: A man fails to jump on a trampoline; a tap dancer falls on his face; and a - woman disrobes to get a bug off.
Video.title: Episode 419

Video.summary: A baseball getting caught in a catcher's mask; an elephant stealing a shoe; and a boy falling into a freezer.
Video.title: Episode 420

Video.summary: A printer toss, a DIY haircut fail, and a shrink-wrap prank gone wrong.
Video.title: Episode 1621

Video.summary: Clips include waxing fails, diving mishaps, a puppy avoiding bath time, and a man kicked by a deer.
Video.title: Episode 1901

Video.summary: Clips include a dad stuck in a car window, med students pranking their teacher, and a man attacked by a bird.
Video.title: Episode 1902
